# Maintainer Checklist

Repository settings to apply outside the codebase:

- Enable branch protection on `main`
- Require the `python-health` and `dashboard-quality` checks
- Require pull requests before merge
- Choose squash or rebase merges and disable merge commits if preferred
- Set repo description, homepage, and topics
- Configure security advisories and private vulnerability reporting
- Review issue labels and project boards if you use them
